task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the complete plan — **6 targeted changes, 2 new files, 4 modifications**:

---

## Plan Summary

### New files
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` | `ThemeColors` + `Theme` interfaces, 3 built-in themes, `getTheme()`, `listThemes()`, `DEFAULT_THEME_ID` — pure TS, same style as `git.ts` |
| `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` | Radio-group component with 3-color preview swatches per theme, matches existing settings button style |

### Modified files
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `packages/shared/package.json` | Add `"./themes"` subpath export (identical pattern to existing) |
| `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` | **Full replacement** — same `useSyncExternalStore` + module-load-flash-prevention pattern; applies CSS custom properties via `style.setProperty()`; keeps `resolvedTheme: "light" \| "dark"` for `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` backward compat |
| `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` | Swap inline THEME_OPTIONS radio buttons → `<ThemeSelector />`; update `useTheme` destructuring |
| `apps/web/src/index.css` | Two-line tweak: use `var(--font-family, ...)` and `var(--font-size, 14px)` on `body` |

### Key design decisions
- **Zero new dependencies** — plain TypeScript + existing Tailwind patterns
- **Backward compat** — `resolvedTheme` preserved so `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` works unchanged; old `"light"`/`"dark"`/`"system"` localStorage values fall back gracefully to `t3-dark`
- **CSS application** — inline `style.setProperty` on `documentElement` has highest specificity, overrides all `:root` declarations cleanly; `.dark` class still toggled for Tailwind dark utilities
